offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent cash flow projections cause missed opportunities for reinvestment. We provide cash flow forecasting instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent cash flow projections lead to missed opportunities for reinvestment.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in Etsy seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try manual entry of payments and expenses
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
